docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C OF S.F., OFC OF THE TREASURER &TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, MICHELLE

STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
